clips.title: The Standoff
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, harsh light. Day. A dusty frontier main street, wooden storefronts, a swinging saloon sign, tumbleweed. The camera whip-pans fast with heavy motion blur and snaps to a person in a long duster coat standing ready, hand hovering, eyes hard. Blowing grit, a distant bell, long shadows. Warm harsh daylight. Fast whip pan, motion-blur snap. Tense cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Rooftop Chase
clips.prompt: Anime style, bold clean linework, cel shading, vibrant color, dynamic. Day. City rooftops with water towers and antennae under a bright sky. The camera whip-pans fast with streaking motion blur and snaps to a person in a flowing jacket mid-sprint leaping a gap, hair flying. Speed lines, scattering pigeons, a glinting skyline. Bright daylight. Fast whip pan, motion-blur snap. Kinetic anime aesthetic, 24fps.
